## Question

Explain gravity to a child.

response_text: Gravity is like an invisible hug that keeps everything stuck to the Earth. Imagine the Earth is a big, squishy pillow, and gravity is the force that makes you stay on it instead of floating away! When you jump, gravity pulls you back down, so you can land safely. It’s why your toys don’t float into the sky and why you can walk on the ground instead of floating like a balloon. Even the moon has gravity, which is why it orbits the Earth, but Earth’s gravity is the strongest one we feel every day! 🌍✨
